summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster, provides no canonical item, disables merge/fix/raise_pr/low-signal closeout, and the preflight artifact shows all 16 candidate PRs are open and non-security-sensitive. Each PR is therefore kept as an independent open PR for normal maintainer or author follow-up.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR with proof; no hydrated duplicate or superseding canonical in this inventory shard.
Independent compatibility/auth-provider fix candidate; no close, merge, or fix action is allowed in plan.

Independent message-routing fix candidate; security-boundary label alone is not routed because preflight marked security_sensitive=false and the body describes routing parity rather than a boundary-bypass report.
Independent provider compatibility fix candidate with proof; no closure target or canonical relation is established.
Independent narrow agents/session-state fix candidate; keep open for maintainer review rather than closing or merging from this plan shard.
Independent focused Telegram fix candidate; no duplicate or superseding PR is hydrated as canonical in this job.
Independent ACP session-state fix candidate; keep open because this shard cannot merge and no close condition is met.
Independent larger Telegram fix/proof candidate; unstable merge state and broad proof harness additions require normal maintainer review rather than automated closeout.
Maintainer-owned independent feature PR; missing check/review-comment detail blocks merge judgment but does not require cluster-level escalation.
Independent maintainer-owned device-pair PR; failed proof blocks any merge/fixed-by action, but there is no duplicate/superseded basis for closure.
Independent contributor PR with useful code and unresolved automated-review context; keep open for normal review.
Independent tiny compatibility fix candidate; no canonical relation or close reason is available.
Independent gateway session-discovery fix candidate; insufficient hydrated check/review detail for merge judgment but no basis for closure.
Potential low-signal/refactor-only concerns are present, but low-signal closeout is disabled by job frontmatter; keep open as an independent PR.
Independent performance fix candidate needing proof/review; no closeout action is permitted or justified.
Independent ClawSweeper/automerge candidate; merge is blocked by job mode/frontmatter and missing check hydration, so keep open.
